description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a predominantly black and dark blue color scheme accented by orange highlights. The body is robust and angular, with a prominent barrel extending forward and a complex upper receiver that includes multiple rails and venting details. The stock is compact and integrated, with a pistol grip and ergonomic contours for improved handling. Visible components include a large magazine or battery compartment at the rear, a detailed trigger guard, and several mechanical elements suggesting advanced functionality. The surface finish is mostly matte with some sleek, glossy accents, and the overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and high-strength polymer. This weapon is designed for urban tactical scenarios, combining modern aesthetics with practical features.
description: A futuristic, tactical shotgun with a black and blue body, orange accents, and a compact, ergonomic design. It features a prominent barrel, integrated stock, and detailed mechanical components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, barrel opening, and symmetrical fore-end details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, upper receiver rails, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact stock, pistol grip, and rear compartment details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible mechanical and ergonomic features.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long with venting and ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with reinforced edges and ergonomic finger grooves
